problem id: ff948917
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10111110 -> 10000101
  00000011 -> 11000000
  10111001 -> 01000101
  11111111 -> 11000111
  00010100 -> 00000000
  01100101 -> 01000011
  10101001 -> 01000101
  11000101 -> 01000110
  11100100 -> 00000111
  01011111 -> 11000010

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 00000001
